identity.title: Gray Light
identity.tagline: A keeper's island besieged by a sentient storm.

constraints: Ecology is self-consistent with a cold volcanic seabird island (auklets, storm-petrels, kelp, lichen; no tropical life).
Light is both tool and beacon: the beam repels the Fogmind but draws its attention; brighter beam = more Fogmind interest.
The Fogmind corrupts perception (phantom sights, false sounds, rerouted paths), not merely vision.
Keepers are a lineage; each left a journal. The lighthouse's history IS the threat.
Actions cost time. Each meaningful action advances the storm one tick. At storm 12 the peak breaks.
A locked connection requires its key item to be in inventory before travel is allowed.
The player cannot fly, swim the open ocean, or leave the island until the boathouse craft is built and launched.

lore_seed.object: a sentient storm besieging the island

ecology._note: Cold volcanic seabird islet. The LLM derives specifics from here; fill free-form.
ecology.TODO_narrative_ecology: Add any story-significant species (e.g. a bird that only sings before a death) here.

lock.lockedText: The storm-cellar door is locked. An iron key would turn it.

journals.j_what: Keeper-3: "The fog spoke in my mother's voice today. I answered it. I will not do that again. If you read this — do not answer the fog."
journals.j_tele: Keeper-7: "Through the glass I saw the last keeper's boat circle the island nine times, then turn and sail INTO the light. No one sailed out. The sea does not give back."
journals.j_echo: Keeper-9 (voice): "I am the record, not the man. The man went down to the cellar and never came up. Pull the lever. Close what he opened."
journals.j_fog: Keeper-5: "The rift is not weather. It is a door the first keeper opened to see across the water. The beam holds it shut. Feed the lamp, keeper. Feed it, or we are all the fog."

iron_key.name: iron key
iron_key.desc: A rusted iron key, salt-eaten but sound.

telescope.name: brass telescope
telescope.desc: A keeper's telescope. Through it, the gray reveals what the eye cannot.

prism_shard.name: prism shard
prism_shard.desc: A warm shard of the original beacon-lens. It hums faintly.

brass_token.name: brass key-token
brass_token.desc: Stamped with the lighthouse seal — authorizes the lamp.

lever.name: black iron lever
lever.desc: Heavy. Pulling it feeds the lamp from the cellar.

puzzles.rule: storm_cellar entry requires iron_key in inventory
lever must be taken and pulled to set leverPulled
beam may only be raised once leverPulled
boathouse build requires prism_shard AND leverPulled
